overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through rainy downtown Los Santos at night. The character passes commercial buildings including a Vapid car dealership, crosses intersections with traffic lights, and walks through an urban plaza featuring a tiered fountain during an active thunderstorm with visible lightning strikes.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with tall office buildings and car dealership

events.description: camera pans down from tall building facade to street level view
female pedestrian in red hat enters frame and walks alongside on sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and the Vapid dealership

notable_agents.action: female character wearing red hat and beige coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: high-rise building with grid of illuminated windows dominating the skyline
automotive showroom with illuminated 'VAPID' signage and large glass display windows
tall palm tree silhouetted against the building lights
tall street light casting warm orange glow on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at a tall modern office building at night. The camera pans down to street level, revealing a wet sidewalk and a Vapid car dealership with illuminated signage. A female pedestrian in a distinctive red hat walks alongside the camera as it moves forward along the commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing vehicles to pass
crossing from sidewalk onto street crosswalk and navigating the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner then crossing the street as the traffic signal changes

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection on the green light

entered.detail: multi-story red brick building with arched windows and decorative stone cornice
tall illuminated glass tower with spire visible in the distance
horizontal traffic signal arm with red lights that change to green
illuminated public telephone enclosure on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a wide urban intersection at night. A historic red brick building stands on the right while a modern glass skyscraper rises in the distance. The traffic light changes from red to green as vehicles pass through, and the character crosses the wet asphalt crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with benches and bus shelter during thunderstorm

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the sky above the buildings
entering open plaza area with benches and trees from the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza as rain falls and lightning periodically flashes in the sky

entered.detail: illuminated transit shelter with red advertisement poster for bacon cheeseburger
wooden slatted bench sitting on the wet plaza pavement
cluster of palm trees surrounding the plaza area
bright lightning bolts visible in the night sky above the downtown buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open urban plaza with benches and a bus shelter. The storm intensifies with visible lightning flashes illuminating the sky above the palm trees and distant buildings. The ground is covered in wet paved tiles reflecting the street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza fountain with tiered water feature and surrounding benches

events.description: approaching and circling around the central fountain structure
close-up view of water jets spraying upward from the fountain basin

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the illuminated circular fountain, walking around its perimeter

entered.detail: large circular fountain with multiple tiers, central water jets, and illuminated basin
classical-style municipal building with columns and illuminated facade
blue and white mosaic tiles lining the tiers of the fountain basin

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the destination: a large circular tiered fountain with illuminated water jets in the center of the plaza. The camera circles the fountain, showing the blue mosaic tiles and water features, while a historic courthouse building stands illuminated in the background and lightning continues to flash in the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy downtown district that transitions from a commercial street into a dramatic, storm-swept urban plaza. It begins with a high angle looking up at a modern office building before panning down to a wet sidewalk and an illuminated Vapid car dealership, where a pedestrian in a red hat walks alongside the camera. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts to a wide intersection where the character crosses wet asphalt between a historic red brick building and a distant glass skyscraper while traffic lights cycle from red to green. The environment then opens into a paved plaza with benches and palm trees, where the storm intensifies and frequent lightning flashes illuminate the dark sky. Finally, the camera reaches and circles a large, tiered fountain with blue mosaic tiles and glowing water jets, set against the backdrop of an illuminated courthouse under the flashing night sky.
